3059490.name: Mission Andromeda
3059490.description:
Mission Andromeda - Escape from Earth is a sci-fi themed roguelite 2D shooter. The action takes place over various procedural levels of gradually increasing size.
Fly your Mining spaceship 'Mole-1' across the Galaxy and gather Ores and Biomass from different planets. Stop off along the way at space-stations and trade your Ores with the local Aliens for various upgrades to your ship and personal equipment.
Entering Deep-space will trigger random events where your choices will steer the outcomes.

Features
  • Procedural Level generation
  • Permadeath
  • Jetpack Physics
  • 3 planet types
  • Over 10 features to upgrade
  • Random Events
